title: Raki v6: EngramLite + Mousse + Progressive Depth Recurrence + Score-First TTT
author: Mertyandimata
original_contributions: EngramLite: multi-head gated bigram+trigram hash (3072 buckets, 2 heads, sigmoid gate)
Mousse optimizer: diagonal curvature-aware Muon preconditioning (arXiv:2603.09697)
Progressive Depth Recurrence: phased activation (step 1500 partial, step 3000 full)
Auto-QMax binary search over clip range [31,127] to maximize artifact utilization
Adaptive Markov Curriculum: bigram-surprise-weighted loss scaling
LoRA TTT investigation: rank-4 adapters tested, full-weight found superior
notes: Single seed due to compute budget constraints
